mistakes.root_cause: The git-amend-agent/first-use.md did not include a mandatory pre-amend staging step. The staging requirement appeared only as a passive checklist item in Success Criteria, not as a blocking verification step before Script Invocation.
mistakes.correct_behavior: After editing files via Edit tool, run git status to verify staging state, then stage all modified files with git add before invoking the amend script.

mistakes.description: work-prepare skill missing lock verification after lock acquisition in Orphaned Worktree Recovery Protocol Step 2 item 4
mistakes.root_cause: Lock session_id validation is mandatory for worktree isolation but is only implemented in work-implement-agent Step 2. The work-prepare skill is missing this validation step after acquiring the lock in Orphaned Worktree Recovery Protocol item 4.

mistakes.description: newWorktreeExcludesClaude() test validates git behavior (file absence) instead of product behavior (sparse-checkout command invocation)
mistakes.root_cause: Test was written to validate that the business requirement (exclude .claude) works by checking the filesystem result, rather than validating that code correctly invokes the sparse-checkout command with correct arguments. Tests should verify your code's behavior, not 3rd-party tool behavior.
mistakes.correct_behavior: Test that code invokes git with correct arguments (mock/verify) or test business outcome (no duplicate rules loaded). Do not test that git produces expected filesystem state.
